title: 宝塚記念の後に・Can't C Me

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur was amazing. She's practically on the
same level as Opera O and Doto!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
I might have underestimated her. I think I'll start
cheering for her from now on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Accept this praise with an open heart. It is for
you, after all.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...For me?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to extol you as well! Your drive and
spirit are truly magnificent, Shakur!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I nearly mistook you for a refreshing breeze,
coursing by! O sole mio! ♪

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Shakur... I, I'm so happy.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm most glad that... well, that everyone realizes
how amazing you are!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur returns from the race completely lost
in thought.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That's not it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: It's something more...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We meander after leaving the venue, in no real
rush to get home. After some time, she slowly
opens up to me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Basically, I thought I was weak.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to connect with someone, and I thought
I needed approval to do that.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
So I wanted to be understood from the bottom of
my heart. Hell, that might even be what I wanted
more than anything else.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But no matter how loudly they yelled, I figured
they were just shrieks.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: But today, it clicked. I don't want any of that.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Not likes or props—none of it!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
In fact, it makes me just as sick whether people
are pushing me away or tryin' to get in close.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Right now, at this point in time, I want to be a
force so strong that no one can look away.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
A force so strong it leaves everyone shaken and
battered.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Siiigh...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You told me to be proud of myself, remember?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You were right. The only person who can really be
proud of you is yourself.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: But it doesn't work if you fake it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna shut up all the loudmouths, and then I'll be proud of myself. That's the way to go about it, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...I'm gonna win on the best stage out there and
establish my total, unshakable dominance.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I need to be so undeniably astounding that even
the thickest idiot'll know who's standing on top.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Now, which race has the gnarliest lineup? Figure
it out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Going by the data and recent trends, there's one
race where a number of the best Umamusume
plan to compete.
choice_data_list: The autumn Tenno Sho looks promising.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Explain.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upperclassmen like T.M. Opera O and Meisho
Doto are a given, but recently, another runner in
Shakur's own year has been making strides.
choice_data_list:
I think Agnes Digital will be competing in the
autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Ah. Her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital debuted the same year as Air
Shakur and has been attracting a lot of attention
lately.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
First she runs on dirt, then she competes in miles,
and now she's entering the autumn Tenno Sho?
She just does whatever she wants, doesn't she?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Once you see her, you'll know. It's pretty obvious.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Anyways, she must have her own reasons for
competin'.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Parcae did predict that Digital would be in the
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The current weather forecast says it'll be pourin'
and the track'll be soft. Couldn't ask for a worse
set of conditions. Well, that's what'll make it
interesting, I suppose...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...All right. That makes two generations for me to
crush.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I like the sound of that. Sure, let's go. Sign me up
for the autumn Tenno Sho.
